text: This patient has a complete fissure between the right middle lobe and right lower lobe.
I divided the fissure with bipolar to expose the pulmonary artery.
Next I mobilize the superior pulmonary vein and I dissect out the right middle lobe vein branch and divide it using the robot wide load stapler.
And then remove the station 11 R lymph node to mobilize the right middle lobe bronchus.
Once it is mobilized, I divide it using the robot blue load stapler.
Next, I mobilize the right middle lobe pulmonary artery.
I attempted to staple from the posterior port but the angle was not favorable.
So I divided the pulmonary artery from the anterior port using the robot wide load stapler.
Once the pulmonary artery was divided, I identified additional right middle lobe veins.
The vein was mobilized and divided using robot white lobe stapler.
The patient had a complete fissure between the right upper lobe and right middle lobe.
This was divided using the robot blue lobe stapler.
